citation: Author, A. (Year). Title of work. Journal/Venue, Vol(Issue), pp. Publisher.
annotation: Placeholder annotation — replaced in Step 3 of the build. Each real entry will have an 80-word annotation explaining what the study does, what its method was, and what a UXR practitioner would take from it without having to read the full paper.
why_uxr: Placeholder — why a UXR practitioner would cite this study in a research plan or readout.
